name: Coventry Rose Jar Potpourri
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure out all ingredients.
2. Combine the rosebud mix, hibiscus flowers, red rosebuds and petals, whole rose leaves, lemon verbena leaves, ribbon-cut orange peel, pink rose buds, Mexican allspice berries, cinnamon sticks, cloves, and cut Orris root in a large jar.
3. Add the essential oils of Rose Garden and Bergamot to the mixture.
4. Stir gently until all ingredients are well combined.
